onboarding.message: Welcome to React Native Shadcn UI

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, app preferences, and voice experience.

speech.title: Speech
speech.description: For best results, select the language you mainly speak. If it's not listed, it may still be supported via auto-detection.

nav.ipad_hint: iPad keeps this navigation pinned by default, and you can collapse it from the header.

home.title: Workspace
home.hero_title: Help employees find fewer entries and finish more work
home.hero_subtitle: The home page aggregates approvals, announcements, meetings, reimbursements, service desk, and AI Q&A, so common internal features can be reached in two taps.
home.primary_subtitle: Place the four most-clicked daily capabilities upfront to reduce navigation depth.

primary.approval_desc: Unified entry for leave, reimbursement, procurement, and seal
primary.meeting_desc: View today's agenda, meeting rooms, and visit plans
primary.qa_desc: Quickly look up policies, processes, templates, and FAQs
primary.announce_desc: View latest notices, policy updates, and security alerts

home.todo_subtitle: Put the personal actions employees care about most on the first screen.
home.quick_subtitle: Turn often hard-to-find support capabilities into flat entries.
home.modules_subtitle: These modules suit further integration with real internal systems and will significantly improve employee efficiency.

modules.process_desc: Approval flows, process templates, favorites for common forms
modules.risk_desc: Policy updates, permission anomalies, contract expiration warnings

love.title: Favorites
love.empty_subtitle: Tap the heart icon on any chat or message to save it here for quick access later.
love.saved_subtitle: Full chats you want to revisit

main.title: Chats
main.hero_subtitle: Move between chat, schedules, and saved moments with a homepage that feels like a real control center instead of a placeholder.
main.primary_intent_detail: Cleaner entry points and stronger hierarchy

links.chat_desc: Jump back into the message workspace.
links.schedule_desc: Manage events, reminders, and calendar sync.

about.title: Schedule
about.sync_to_system_desc: When enabled, new events are written to the system calendar, and system events can also be read on the left.
about.no_calendar_hint: Load system calendars first, then choose the target calendar to write to.
about.sync_capability_desc: The page reads existing system calendar events and can sync new events to the system calendar. Synced events can be opened directly in the system calendar from the left list.
about.selected_subtitle: Local events and system calendar items are shown here together.
about.no_event_subtitle: Create a new event on the right, or click refresh to sync schedules from the system calendar.

alert.web_unsupported: System calendar is not supported on web.
alert.device_unsupported: System calendar capability is not available on this device.
alert.no_permission_desc: Please allow the app to access the system calendar in system settings first.
alert.time_invalid: End time must be later than start time.
alert.sync_failed_desc: Failed to write to system calendar.
alert.open_failed_desc: Could not open the system calendar event.
alert.delete_confirm: Confirm deleting this local event? If it has been synced to the system calendar, it will also be removed.

chat.title: Chat
chat.start_subtitle: Ask for product copy, code review, summaries, or quick brainstorming.
chat.request_failed: Request failed, please try again later.

suggestions.turbulence_subtitle: in a simple and calm tone
suggestions.release_subtitle: for a new mobile chat feature

history.current_preview: Simple analogy for a first-time flyer
history.release_preview: Mobile chat update and keyboard polish

auth.sign_in_desc: Use your AD account to sign in to your workspace.
auth.forgot_desc: Please contact your IT administrator to reset your AD password.
auth.login_failed_desc: Please check your account and password.
auth.register_desc: Start with the essentials and keep the setup flow lightweight.
auth.register_footer: This currently loops back to sign-in so the rest of the interface stays demo-ready while authentication is still being polished.
auth.register_description: Set up your profile once, then move between chat, schedules, and favorites without friction.
auth.register_shell_footer: This stays as a polished demo flow for now, so we can improve the visuals before wiring real authentication.
auth.social_alert_desc: Sign in with {{provider}} is not yet available.
